entities.name: HOMOSOILS
entities.description: Soils that can be geographically distant but share similar soil-forming factors

entities.description: The availability of soil data in various areas of the world

entities.description: Existing soil surveys that require updating with new data

entities.name: SOIL-FORMING FACTORS
entities.description: Factors that contribute to the formation and characteristics of soil

entities.name: DISTANCE METRICS
entities.description: Metrics used to identify homosoils in the character space of environmental covariates

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL COVARIATES
entities.description: Variables that span the character space used to calculate distance metrics

entities.description: A database from which soil data for various areas was collected
